_meta.session: BMT batch 1 — Priority 6 long-context. HELMET (ICLR 2025) leaderboard covers original cohort of 59 LCLMs up to 128k (GPT-4o, Gemini-1.5-Pro, Claude-3.5-Sonnet, Llama-3.1). Frontier labs have shifted to MRCR/RULER/LongBench v2/internal needle-in-haystack variants in system cards rather than HELMET. Metadata registered; substitute candidates for actual long-context frontier data: MRCR, RULER-128k, LongBench v2 (already tracked).

benchmarks.name: HELMET
benchmarks.description: Princeton ICLR 2025: application-centric long-context benchmark across 7 categories (RAG, passage re-ranking, long-doc QA, summarization, many-shot ICL, synthetic recall, citation). Paper cohort: 59 LCLMs up to 128k.
